name: io.github.meloliva14/verity-mcp
description: Independent, fail-closed 'verify before you spend/send/trust' gate for AI agents: fact-check (catch hallucinations), prompt-injection detection, content moderation, PII/secret detection, and a pre-action guardrail (allow/review/block). Keyless, pay-per-call via x402 (USDC on Base).
